hero.title: Partners.
hero.intro: Zomaar Zomert is free for everyone — made possible by the companies, local shops and supporters who back us year after year.

become.title: Become a partner.
become.body: Reach thousands of festival-goers, support the local community, and end up in great company. Pick a formula, or call us for something tailor-made.

perks.1: Logo on stage, T-shirts and website
